modal_structure.wrapper: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4
modal_structure.container: relative w-full max-w-4xl max-h-[90vh] bg-[#0f172a] border border-[#1e293b] rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden
modal_structure.header: flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-[#1e293b] bg-[#0f172a]/95 backdrop-blur sticky top-0 z-10
modal_structure.body: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-0 scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-[#334155] scrollbar-track-transparent
modal_structure.footer: flex items-center justify-end gap-3 px-6 py-4 border-t border-[#1e293b] bg-[#0f172a] sticky bottom-0 z-10

tabs_navigation.container: flex items-center gap-1 px-6 border-b border-[#1e293b] bg-[#0f172a]
tabs_navigation.item: relative px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-[#94a3b8] hover:text-[#f8fafc] transition-colors data-[state=active]:text-[#dc2626] data-[state=active]:after:content-[''] data-[state=active]:after:absolute data-[state=active]:after:bottom-0 data-[state=active]:after:left-0 data-[state=active]:after:w-full data-[state=active]:after:h-[2px] data-[state=active]:after:bg-[#dc2626]

inputs.base: bg-[#1e293b] border-[#334155] text-[#f8fafc] placeholder:text-[#64748b] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#dc2626] focus:border-[#dc2626] h-10 transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#94a3b8] mb-1.5 block

buttons.primary: bg-[#dc2626] hover:bg-[#b91c1c] text-white shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(220,38,38,0.25)] font-medium h-10 px-4 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#334155] text-[#f8fafc] hover:bg-[#1e293b] h-10 px-4
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-[#1e293b] text-[#94a3b8] hover:text-[#f8fafc] h-8 w-8 p-0

pricing_cards.card: cursor-pointer relative flex flex-col items-start p-5 border rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 group
pricing_cards.icon_wrapper: p-2 rounded-md bg-[#0f172a] border border-[#334155] text-[#f8fafc] mb-3 group-hover:border-[#dc2626]/50 group-hover:text-[#dc2626] transition-colors
pricing_cards.title: text-base font-semibold text-[#f8fafc] mb-1

intake_builder.empty_state: border border-dashed border-[#334155] rounded-lg p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center bg-[#1e293b]/20

question_card.wrapper: group bg-[#1e293b] border border-[#334155] rounded-lg p-0 overflow-hidden transition-all hover:border-[#475569]
question_card.header: flex items-center justify-between p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#334155]/20
question_card.content: p-4 border-t border-[#334155] bg-[#0f172a]/30 space-y-4 animate-accordion-down
question_card.type_badge: text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-[#0f172a] border border-[#334155] text-[#94a3b8]

tabs.General: Product basics (Name, Tagline, Category, Description, Active Status)
tabs.Store Card: Catalog preview settings (Card Title, Tag, Bullets)
tabs.Pricing: The core logic (Type Selection + Intake Questions)

types.label: Internal Checkout
types.description: Standard checkout with base price and custom intake questions.

types.label: External Link
types.description: Redirects customers to a third-party URL (e.g., Stripe, Gumroad).

types.label: Enquiry Only
types.description: No checkout. Customers must contact sales to purchase.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the modal with the `Dialog` component from shadcn/ui.
2. Implement the `Tabs` component for navigation. Ensure 'Pricing' is the center of attention.
3. Build the `PricingTypeSelector` component first - this drives the logic of the Pricing tab.
4. For `Internal` pricing type, build the `IntakeQuestionsBuilder` component.
5. The Builder must allow adding questions. Use a 'Add Question' button that opens a Popover with question types.
6. Use `Collapsible` for question cards in the builder list. Header shows summary, body shows form.
7. Ensure the `Store Card` tab has a live preview on the right side (split pane) or bottom.
8. Use the provided hex codes. Do NOT fallback to default Tailwind colors. Use the 'slate-900' range.
9. Add `data-testid` to all inputs and buttons (e.g., `data-testid='pricing-type-internal'`).

do_not: Use default scrollbars (Hide them or style them thin).
Center-align form text (Always left-align labels and inputs).
must_do: Add micro-interactions (hover scale, border glow) to cards.
Ensure all inputs have a clearly defined :focus state (Red ring).
